name: NBS School Report Card
html:
{% set student = doc %} {% set enrollments = frappe.get_all('Program Enrollment', filters={'student': student.name, 'docstatus': 1}, fields=['name', 'program', 'academic_term', 'academic_year'], order_by='creation desc', page_length=1) %} {% set latest_enrollment = enrollments[0] if enrollments else None %} {% set academic_term = latest_enrollment.academic_term if latest_enrollment else None %} {% set academic_year = latest_enrollment.academic_year if latest_enrollment else None %} {% set program_name = latest_enrollment.program if latest_enrollment else 'N/A' %} {% set assessments = [] %} {% if academic_term %} {% set assessments = frappe.get_all('Assessment Result', filters={'student': student.name, 'academic_term': academic_term, 'docstatus': 1}, fields=['name', 'course', 'total_score', 'maximum_score', 'grade', 'comment', 'assessment_plan', 'program', 'student_name'], order_by='course asc') %} {% endif %} {% set total_present = frappe.get_all('Student Attendance', filters={'student': student.name, 'status': 'Present'}, fields=['name']) | length %} {% set total_absent = frappe.get_all('Student Attendance', filters={'student': student.name, 'status': 'Absent'}, fields=['name']) | length %} {% set total_attendance = total_present + total_absent %} {% set attendance_pct = (total_present / total_attendance * 100) | round(1) if total_attendance > 0 else 0 %} {% set guardian_list = student.guardians if student.guardians else [] %} {% set guardian_names = [] %} {% for g in guardian_list %} {% set gname = frappe.db.get_value('Guardian', g.guardian, 'guardian_name') if g.guardian else '' %} {% if gname %}{% set _ = guardian_names.append(gname) %}{% endif %} {% endfor %}
